ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_snippets" (
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code snippet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code snippet */,
  "reference_code" TEXT /* Reference code or the actual code snippet */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity score of the code snippet */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the programming language of the code snippet */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the code snippet */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the code snippet was uploaded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the code snippet was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the code snippet */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the snippet is public or private */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the snippet is archived */,
  "license" TEXT /* The license under which the snippet is shared */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file where the snippet is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_snippets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_snippets_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES programming_languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programming_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programming language */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is active and supported */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the language was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality score entry */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet being evaluated */,
  "rouge_1_r" REAL /* ROUGE-1 recall score */,
  "rouge_1_f" REAL /* ROUGE-1 F1 score */,
  "explanation_quality" INTEGER /* Explanation quality (1 for high, 0 for low) */,
  "human_explanation" TEXT /* Detailed explanation of the quality score */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the score */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the score was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_scores_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_scores_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES snippet_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_category_mapping_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_code" TEXT /* Code of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "is_released" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is released */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_versions_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the code snippet */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the code snippet was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., view, copy, execute) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the usage was successful */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the usage event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_usage_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is flagged for review */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_comments_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating the code snippet */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rating is flagged for review */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_ratings_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tag is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_tag_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag mapping */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_tag_mapping_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_tag_mapping_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES snippet_tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snippet_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "snippet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code snippet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the snippet */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_ownership_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snippet_ownership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
